query:
CREATE TABLE `flow_edges` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`flowId` int NOT NULL,
	`edgeId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`sourceNodeId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`targetNodeId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT `flow_edges_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

	`flowId` int NOT NULL,
	`edgeId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`sourceNodeId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`targetNodeId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT `flow_edges_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
